 easily, quick & safely

Krakem – Crypto payment solution give you opportunity to purchase cryptocurrency easily, quick and safety. With low fees, most reliable customer service, Krakem is comfortable way to buy cryptocurrency. Ipso facto start your new rich life today!

Choose the best way to buy crypto

Choose your preferred option from all major global payment methods. Buy crypto with debit cards, credit cards, bank transfers and many others.

From Visa to Mastercard and Apple Pay to SEPA, and 570+ alternative payment methods powered by Nuvei, we make crypto payments painless.

  • Krakem ATM location

Find a Location Nationwide

ATMs are conveniently located and typically open 24hrs. Browse our locations by clicking on the map or using the link below. Check back often as new ATMs are opening up nationwide every week.

View all locations of our ATMs

Host an ATM

We are looking for locations with high foot traffic and long operating hours. Krakem will pay you to host our Bitcoin ATMs in your store.

  • Get App

Krakem App
 Crypto payment solution

Krakem offers the Krakem App, a crypto payment solution designed to simplify the purchase of digital currency either in person at retail locations for cash, through bitcoin ATM or T1 terminals placed on cashier desks, or online with credit or debit cards using.

DownloaD App

Bitcoin ATM

Smart and Secure Way To Buy a Bitcoin

Our machines are designed to make your intial signup a smooth process. Just follow the easy steps on screen and you’ll be registered and ready to buy bitcoin in no time.

Why Choose Us

Send Bitcoins Directly to Your Wallet

Krakem ATM delivers your bitcoin directly to your wallet. While Bitcoin ATMs are compatible with any Bitcoin wallet, we recommend Trezor Wallet for the best secure.

Trezor Wallet
